hints.title: Hint 1
hints.content: Sort the array first. How does sorting help you avoid duplicate triplets and use efficient pointer movement?

hints.title: Hint 2
hints.content: Fix one element `nums[i]` and use two pointers (`left = i+1`, `right = n-1`) to find pairs that sum to `-nums[i]`.

hints.title: Hint 3
hints.content: After sorting, skip duplicate values for `i`, `left`, and `right` to avoid duplicate triplets in the output.
